creator: t.masub@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186059
SHOWVER option patch

When the ESXi host is 5.5, the guest operating system will be displayed as "Other (32-bit)".
In order to avoid this problem, OS version detection can be specified by OPTIONS.
The default is enabled.

Host:
VMware ESXi 5.5

Guest:
% uname -rm
11.1-RELEASE-p1 amd64
